overall.description: A hooded player character stands on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak across a tranquil lake. Dramatic sun rays pierce through parting clouds in this cinematic third-person game scene.

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, silently contemplating the vast mountain landscape with slight idle movements

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit bathed in golden sunlight
calm reflective water body nestled in the valley below
stone outcrop where the character stands overlooking the vista
dense tree cover visible on the slopes below the mountain
thick cloud formations parting to reveal bright sun rays

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky precipice overlooking a vast natural landscape. A snow-capped mountain rises in the distance across a tranquil lake, while golden hour sunlight streams through dramatic cloud formations overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze from a rocky precipice across a vast, light-filled natural landscape. It begins with the hooded character standing still on the rugged overlook, framing a distant snow-capped mountain that rises above a tranquil lake. As the camera lingers, the golden hour sunlight intensifies, streaming through dramatic cloud formations to illuminate the valley below. The scene finally settles on the contrast between the dark, rocky foreground and the brilliant, shimmering peaks in the distance.
